data.body: PASS-1 review (T11 Data-migration / backfill safety): PASS — not-applicable. The plan introduces an additive REVIEW_RESULT-sidecar/signature event scheme with explicit old/new coexistence (older clones preserve-and-ignore new events), and does not backfill existing rows or perform a blocking DDL on a large table. No migration-EXECUTION behavior (expand-contract, batching, resumability, dual-write window) is in scope, so T11 does not apply. No findings.
